ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the instructor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the instructor */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the instructor was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of expertise or specialization */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the instructor's profile picture */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating given by students */,
  "total_courses_taught" INTEGER /* Total number of courses taught by the instructor */,
  "total_students_teaching" INTEGER /* Total number of students taught by the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category or type of the course */,
  "level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the course */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "syllabus" TEXT /* Detailed syllabus of the course */,
  "enrollment_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the course is currently active and available for enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor assigned to the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being assigned */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Average hours per week the instructor is expected to spend on the course */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* Expected class size for the course */,
  "assistant_instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of any assistant instructor assigned to the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_assistant_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is offered (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is offered */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location where the course is offered */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the course offering */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Whether the course offering has been completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the student */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the student's profile picture */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major or field of study of the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status (e.g., Enrolled, Graduated) */,
  "total_courses_enrolled" INTEGER /* Total number of courses the student has enrolled in */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the student for courses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is enrolled in (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is enrolled in */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade received by the student in the course */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of classes attended by the student */,
  "dropout_reason" TEXT /* Reason for dropping out, if applicable */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Whether the student has completed the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being evaluated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student evaluating the course */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the student */,
  "instructor_rating" REAL /* Rating given to the instructor */,
  "course_structure_rating" REAL /* Rating given to the course structure */,
  "difficulty_rating" REAL /* Rating given to the difficulty level of the course */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the evaluation is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor being evaluated */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being taught */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is taught (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is taught */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating given by students for the instructor's teaching */,
  "feedback_summary" TEXT /* Summary of feedback received from students */,
  "improvement_areas" TEXT /* Areas identified for improvement */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Whether the instructor has been flagged for further review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_performance_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_performance_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being tracked */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by students for the course */,
  "total_students_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of students who completed the course */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students who dropped out of the course */,
  "average_attendance" REAL /* Average attendance rate of students in the course */,
  "average_grade" REAL /* Average grade of students in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_statistics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
